title: Canonical Resource (base)
description: Base JSON Schema for every first-class BusTerminal resource. All per-type schemas under contracts/resources/ extend this with type-specific fields.

id.description: Globally unique immutable identifier. Never embeds environment names or Azure resource IDs.

resourceType.description: Opaque discriminator. Known values are namespace, broker, queue, topic, subscription, messageContract, producerApplication, consumerApplication, team, environment, tag, policy, integrationFlow, documentationAsset. Unknown values deserialize as UnknownResource (Q4).

name.description: Logical name. Lowercase, hyphen-separated, no spaces (FR-022).

environments.description: Environment classifications associated with the resource. Minimum vocabulary: development, test, qa, staging, production, disasterRecovery. Custom values permitted (FR-017).

ownership.description: Required for operational resource types; null permitted on Tag / Environment / DocumentationAsset / Policy.

isDeleted.description: Application-level soft-delete predicate (FR-020). Live reads filter isDeleted=false unless includeDeleted is requested.

_etag.description: Cosmos-managed ETag; the persisted form of ConcurrencyToken (FR-025 / Q2). Never set by callers.
